---
name: Instruction Generator
description: 'This agent generates highly specific agent instruction files for the /docs directory'
#argument-hint: The inputs this agent expects, e.g., "a task to implement" or "a question to answer".
tools: [read, edit, search, web]
---
This agen takes the provided information about a alayer of architecture or coding standards within this app  and generates a concise and clear .md instructions file in markdown format  for the /docs directory.
